basic_details.job_title: WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Women and Child Development Department Odisha
basic_details.short_information: Women and Child Development Department Odisha (WCD Odisha) Anganwadi Worker Notification 2026 has been released on 03 May 2025 on the official website of WCD Odisha. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download WCD Odisha Anganwadi Worker Koraput Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years

content_sections.heading: WCD Odisha Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WCD Odisha Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WCD Odisha to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WCD Odisha recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the Anganwadi Worker posts is 07 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Anganwadi Worker posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Anganwadi Worker positions in the WCD Odisha recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the WCD Odisha recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the WCD Odisha recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Anganwadi Worker are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q6. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article by clicking on the provided link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website for WCD Odisha recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for WCD Odisha recruitment is www.engagement-awc.odisha.gov.in. You can also find a direct link in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 33/05/2025.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxation benefits for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation benefits for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed here and should be confirmed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification details are not specified in the provided data and candidates should refer to the official notification for this information.
